## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related Issues

Link related issues (e.g., `Closes #123`).

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `mypy`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `python -m build`

## Risk Assessment

List potential regressions and mitigations.

## Screenshots / Logs

Provide screenshots or command output when helpful.
